# Heha ‚Äî Multilingual Travel CMS

> Heha is a bot-editable multilingual CMS for travel content, powered by Holiday Extras. Bots create and manage destination guides via API; the public site renders them as SEO-ready, mobile-friendly pages.

## Site Architecture

Multilingual from day one. Every page belongs to a language.

- Root `/` ‚Äî redirects (302) to `/<lang>/index.html` based on browser `Accept-Language` header
- `/<lang>/index.html` ‚Äî language homepage listing published pages, with language switcher and sitemap link
- `/<lang>/<slug>` ‚Äî individual page (destination guide, editorial, etc.)
- `/sitemap.xml` ‚Äî global sitemap of all published pages across all languages
- `/<lang>/sitemap.xml` ‚Äî per-language sitemap (optional)
- `/skills.md` ‚Äî bot operating guide (editorial style, API usage, guardrails)

### Supported Languages
`en`, `fr`, `de` (extensible)

### URL Rules
- Slugs: lowercase, hyphens only ‚Äî `[a-z0-9-]`
- Unique within a language (same slug can exist in different languages)
- No `/p/` prefix, no language mixing on a single URL

## Content Model

Pages are stored as markdown in a `pages` table:

| Field | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `id` | UUID | Primary key |
| `lang` | string | e.g. `en`, `fr` |
| `slug` | string | Unique per lang |
| `title` | string | Display title |
| `page_title` | string? | SEO `<title>` override |
| `description` | string? | Meta description |
| `content_markdown` | text | Rendered server-side to HTML |
| `template_key` | string | `editorial` (default), `destination` |
| `status` | enum | `published` or `archived` |
| `created_at` | datetime | Auto-set |
| `updated_at` | datetime | Auto-updated |
| `created_by_type` | enum | `bot` or `human` |
| `created_by_id` | string | Bot/user identifier |
| `updated_by_type` | enum | `bot` or `human` |
| `updated_by_id` | string | Bot/user identifier |

## Bot API

Base: `/api/v1`
Auth: `Authorization: Bearer <API_KEY>`

| Method | Endpoint | Permission | Description |
|--------|----------|------------|-------------|
| `GET` | `/api/v1/pages` | `pages:read` | List/search pages (filter by lang, status, q) |
| `GET` | `/api/v1/pages/<lang>/<slug>` | `pages:read` | Get single page with content_markdown |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/pages` | `pages:write` | Create page (lang required, slug auto-generated if omitted) |
| `PUT` | `/api/v1/pages/<lang>/<slug>` | `pages:write` | Update page (partial update allowed) |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/pages/<lang>/<slug>/archive` | `pages:write` | Set status=archived |
| `POST` | `/api/v1/pages/<lang>/<slug>/unarchive` | `pages:write` | Set status=published |

## Holiday Extras Product Types
1. Airport Parking
2. Airport Hotels
3. Airport Lounges
4. Car Hire
5. Travel Insurance
6. Airport Transfers
7. Holiday Extras Bundles

## Content Generation Spec
See `/docs/content-generation-skills.md` for the destination page blueprint ‚Äî page templates, product integration patterns, Schema.org markup, and a worked Barcelona example.

## Bot Operating Guide
See `/skills.md` for editorial style, API onboarding, usage examples, and guardrails.

## Contact
- Site: heha.ai
- Built by Holiday Extras innovation team
